hero.title: Let experts run your job search
hero.subtitle: We built the system that gets you hired. Then hired world-class strategists. Now they run your career transition.

items.title: Strategy first
items.body: We map your target roles, identify gaps, and build a focused plan.

items.title: Assets that convert
items.body: Resume, LinkedIn, and pitch rebuilt to create real signal.

items.title: Interview-ready
items.body: Mock interviews, story prep, and live feedback before every call.

items.title: Offer negotiation
items.body: We help you evaluate, negotiate, and close the right deal.

reviews.name: Marcus Chen
reviews.quote: Went from 2% callback rate to landing 4 interviews in 2 weeks. The resume rewrite alone was worth it.

reviews.name: Sarah Martinez
reviews.quote: Steve helped me articulate my impact in a way I never could. Every interviewer mentioned my resume stood out.

reviews.name: David Park
reviews.quote: The mock interviews were intense but exactly what I needed. Walked into my final round feeling fully prepared.

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.quote: Negotiated $40K more than my initial offer. The scripts and strategy Steve gave me made all the difference.

reviews.name: Alex Thompson
reviews.quote: Was stuck for 8 months. 3 weeks with Askia and I had multiple interviews lined up. Game changer.

reviews.name: Jennifer Wu
reviews.quote: The portfolio review transformed how I present my work. Finally feel like my experience matches my story.

coach.title: Meet Steve
coach.credential: Former engineering leader. Now career strategist.
coach.body: I've reviewed thousands of resumes, interviewed hundreds of candidates, and made hiring decisions at every level. I built Askia because I kept seeing the same pattern: incredible people getting passed over because they didn't know how to tell their story.
bullets: Hired across tech, product, and leadership
Now helps you land the role you deserve

cta.title: Ready to stop being overlooked?
cta.body: 15 minutes. Leave with a clear action plan. No sales pitch.
